_org_id_note: Adobe doesn't expose org names via API. Hard-code the org_id<->label mapping in babelfish_query_renamer.py (ORG_LABELS).
_usage: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your own values. Keep one config.json per Adobe org. Underscored keys are comments and ignored by the loader.
_org_labels_note: Optional. Maps real org_id -> friendly folder label for sql/<label>/. Kept here (gitignored) so real org IDs stay out of version control.

my_user_ids.id: <paste your userId once discovered via the picker>
my_user_ids.label: <friendly label, e.g. primary>

_anthropic_note: Optional. If anthropic_api_key is set, Claude is used to suggest names from the SQL itself. Leave empty to fall back to the local heuristic.

naming_config.instructions: <optional extra naming rules, e.g. 'Always include the primary dataset name. Prefer noun-verb format like users-count or events-by-day.'>
